evalCases.request: Compare the methodology sections across these five climate adaptation papers
Find weeks next month that are unusually meeting-heavy
Review the single grant proposal file proposal_42.docx for unclear claims
Run the relevant tests for the changed parser files
Prioritize suspicious login alerts by likely account risk
Book a refundable hotel room near Kyoto station
Caption these three uploaded interview videos
Escalate ticket SUP-481 because the user is blocked
Link these four wiki pages to the canonical onboarding answer
Rollback deployment deploy_773 for the staging search service
Draft announcements for the three regional office closures
Issue a courtesy credit memo on invoice INV-2026-118 for last week outage
Refund captured payment CHG-9281 to the original card
Apply promo code CONF2026 to these three renewal invoices
Change account ACME-42 base subscription rate to the contracted nonprofit rate
Order twenty replacement laptops for the design team
File a trademark application for the new product name
